answers: PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder): flashbacks, nightmares, hypervigilance, avoidance, and emotional numbness after trauma.
Treatment: therapy (CBT, EMDR, CPT), medication (SSRIs), support groups, and lifestyle changes (exercise, sleep, routine).
PTSD is a medical condition, not weakness. Effective treatments exist — seek help from a mental health professional.
PTSD symptoms: disturbing memories, avoiding reminders, negative mood changes, and being easily startled. Treatment works.
